title: anacheilium glumaceum
intro: Anacheilium glumaceum, also known as the yellow pleurothallis or yellow pleurothallis orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Anacheilium glumaceum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, Anacheilium glumaceum is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
